hub.title: aitorevi.tools — mini tools that run in your browser
hub.description: A collection of free web mini-tools that run 100% in your browser, with no sign-up and without uploading files to any server.
hub.ogTitle: aitorevi.tools — tools that run in your browser
hub.ogDescription: Free web mini-tools that run 100% in your browser: no sign-up and no uploading files to any server.
hub.jsonldDescription: Web mini-tools that run 100% in the browser, with no server and no uploads.
hub.subtitle: Free web mini-utilities that run entirely in your browser. No sign-up, no server, and your files never leave your device.

soonCard.name: More tools
soonCard.desc: I'm preparing new mini-utilities focused on privacy and speed. Check back soon.

licenses.title: Licenses — aitorevi.tools
licenses.description: Third-party libraries and fonts used in aitorevi.tools, with their licenses (MIT and SIL Open Font License).
licenses.ogDescription: Third-party software and fonts used in aitorevi.tools and their licenses.
licenses.subtitle: aitorevi.tools uses these open-source libraries and fonts, with their copyright notices and licenses.
licenses.disclaimer: aitorevi.tools is provided as is, without warranty. Your files are processed entirely in your browser and are never sent to any server.

meta.title: Format JSON — beautify and minify online, in your browser
meta.description: Beautify (pretty-print) and minify JSON instantly in your browser. Validates the syntax and points out the error. Free, no sign-up and nothing is uploaded to any server.
meta.ogDescription: Beautify and minify JSON in your browser. Validates the syntax on the fly. Free and nothing uploaded.
meta.jsonldDescription: Format and minify JSON in the browser, validating the syntax, without sending the text to any server.

card.name: Format JSON
card.desc: Beautify or minify JSON and validate the syntax instantly.

ui.subtitle: Paste your JSON to beautify it (2-space indent) or minify it. It validates the syntax and everything happens in your browser.
ui.cardAria: Tool to format and minify JSON

meta.title: Format XML — beautify and minify online, in your browser
meta.description: Beautify (pretty-print) and minify XML instantly in your browser. Validates tag nesting and points out the error. Free, no sign-up and nothing is uploaded to any server.
meta.ogDescription: Beautify and minify XML in your browser. Validates tag nesting. Free and nothing uploaded.
meta.jsonldDescription: Format and minify XML in the browser, validating tag nesting, without sending the text to any server.

card.name: Format XML
card.desc: Beautify or minify XML and validate tag nesting instantly.

ui.subtitle: Paste your XML to beautify it (2-space indent) or minify it. It validates tag nesting and everything happens in your browser.
ui.cardAria: Tool to format and minify XML

meta.title: Format SQL — beautify queries online, in your browser
meta.description: Beautify (pretty-print) SQL queries instantly in your browser, with multi-dialect support (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, T-SQL, PL/SQL, BigQuery). Free, no sign-up and nothing uploaded.
meta.ogDescription: Beautify SQL queries in your browser, multi-dialect. Free and nothing uploaded.
meta.jsonldDescription: Beautify SQL queries in the browser, multi-dialect, without sending the text to any server.

card.name: Format SQL
card.desc: Beautify SQL queries with indentation and uppercase keywords. Multi-dialect.

ui.subtitle: Paste your SQL query and pick the dialect to beautify it with 2-space indent and uppercase keywords. Everything happens in your browser.

meta.title: Format YAML — beautify and validate online, in your browser
meta.description: Format (pretty-print) and validate YAML instantly in your browser: normalize to block style with 2-space indent and point out syntax errors. Free, no sign-up and nothing uploaded.
meta.ogDescription: Beautify and validate YAML in your browser. Free and nothing uploaded.
meta.jsonldDescription: Format and validate YAML in the browser, without sending the text to any server.

card.name: Format YAML
card.desc: Normalize and validate YAML to block style with 2-space indent.

ui.subtitle: Paste your YAML to normalize it to block style with 2-space indent. It validates the syntax and everything happens in your browser.
ui.cardAria: Tool to format and validate YAML

meta.title: Format HTML and CSS — beautify online, in your browser
meta.description: Beautify (pretty-print) HTML and CSS instantly in your browser. Auto-detects the language and applies 2-space indent. Free, no sign-up and nothing uploaded.
meta.ogDescription: Beautify HTML and CSS in your browser, with auto-detection. Free and nothing uploaded.
meta.jsonldDescription: Beautify HTML and CSS in the browser, detecting the language, without sending the text to any server.

card.name: Format HTML/CSS
card.desc: Beautify HTML and CSS with 2-space indent. Auto-detects the language.

ui.subtitle: Paste your HTML or CSS to beautify it with 2-space indent. It auto-detects the language and everything happens in your browser.
ui.cardAria: Tool to format HTML and CSS

meta.title: Format JavaScript and TypeScript — Prettier online, in your browser
meta.description: Beautify (pretty-print) JavaScript and TypeScript code instantly in your browser with Prettier. Free, no sign-up and nothing is uploaded to any server.
meta.ogDescription: Beautify JavaScript and TypeScript in your browser with Prettier. Free and nothing uploaded.
meta.jsonldDescription: Beautify JavaScript and TypeScript with Prettier in the browser, without sending the text to any server.

card.name: Format JS / TS
card.desc: Beautify JavaScript and TypeScript with Prettier, the standard formatter.

ui.subtitle: Paste your JavaScript or TypeScript code and pick the language to beautify it with Prettier. Everything happens in your browser.
ui.cardAria: Tool to format JavaScript and TypeScript

meta.title: JSON to C# and TypeScript — generate classes online, in your browser
meta.description: Generate C# classes or TypeScript interfaces from JSON instantly in your browser. Type inference powered by quicktype. Free, no sign-up and nothing uploaded.
meta.ogTitle: JSON to C# and TypeScript — generate classes
meta.ogDescription: Generate C# classes or TypeScript interfaces from JSON, in your browser. Free and nothing uploaded.
meta.jsonldDescription: Generate C# classes or TypeScript interfaces from JSON in the browser, without sending the text to any server.

card.name: JSON to C# / TypeScript
card.desc: Generate C# classes or TypeScript interfaces from JSON, with type inference.

ui.subtitle: Paste JSON and pick the language to generate C# classes or TypeScript interfaces. Type inference happens in your browser.
ui.cardAria: Tool to generate C# or TypeScript types from JSON

meta.title: Decode JWT — inspect tokens online, in your browser
meta.description: Decode the header and payload of a JSON Web Token (JWT) instantly in your browser. It does not verify the signature; it only inspects. The token never leaves your device.
meta.ogDescription: Decode the header and payload of a JWT in your browser. The token is not uploaded to any server.
meta.jsonldDescription: Decode the header and payload of a JWT in the browser, without sending the token to any server.

card.name: Decode JWT
card.desc: Inspect the header and payload of a JSON Web Token without it leaving the browser.

ui.subtitle: Paste a JSON Web Token to see its header and payload. The signature is not verified (that needs the key); the token never leaves your browser.
ui.cardAria: Tool to decode JSON Web Tokens

meta.title: Regex tester — test regular expressions in your browser
meta.description: Test regular expressions against a text and see the matches highlighted instantly, with flags (g, i, m, s, u, y). Free, no sign-up and all in your browser.
meta.ogDescription: Test regular expressions and see the matches highlighted in your browser. Free and nothing uploaded.
meta.jsonldDescription: Test regular expressions against a text in the browser, highlighting the matches, without sending anything to any server.

card.name: Regex tester
card.desc: Test regular expressions and highlight matches live, with flags.

ui.subtitle: Type a regular expression and a test text to see the matches highlighted instantly. Everything happens in your browser.

meta.title: Split PDF — split a PDF into single pages, free and in your browser
meta.description: Split any PDF into individual pages right in your browser. Free, no sign-up and without uploading files to any server. Download individually or as a ZIP.
meta.ogTitle: Split PDF — split a PDF into single pages
meta.ogDescription: Split a PDF into individual pages in your browser. Free, no sign-up and no uploads. Download individually or as a ZIP.
meta.jsonldDescription: Split a PDF into individual pages in the browser. Download individually or as a ZIP, without uploading files to any server.

card.name: Split PDF
card.desc: Split any PDF into single pages and download them one by one or all together in a ZIP.

ui.subtitle: Split any PDF into single pages and download them one by one or all in a ZIP.
ui.dropAria: Select or drop a PDF file
ui.lead: Drag your PDF here or click to choose it
ui.hint: It's processed only on your device. Nothing is sent to the internet.

msg.notPdf: That file doesn't look like a PDF. Try another one.

msg.confirmMany: You're about to download {n} files separately. Your browser may ask permission for multiple downloads. Continue?
msg.manyError: There was a problem during the downloads.

meta.title: Remove image metadata (EXIF/GPS) — free and in your browser
meta.description: Remove EXIF metadata, GPS location and camera data from your JPG or PNG photos, without losing quality and in your browser. Free and without uploading the image to any server.
meta.ogDescription: Remove EXIF, GPS location and camera data from your photos, without losing quality and in your browser. Free and no uploads.
meta.jsonldDescription: Remove EXIF, GPS and camera metadata from JPG or PNG photos without re-compressing, in the browser, without uploading the image to any server.

card.name: Remove metadata
card.desc: Remove EXIF, GPS location and camera data from your photos, without losing quality.

ui.subtitle: Remove EXIF, GPS location and camera data from your photos before sharing. Without losing quality.
ui.dropAria: Select or drop a JPG or PNG image
ui.lead: Drag your photo here or click to choose it
ui.hint: JPG or PNG · nothing is sent to the internet.
ui.note: Lossless: only metadata is removed (EXIF/GPS/XMP); your image pixels stay identical.
